caveat: This framework content pack is a structured starter representation and does not constitute legal advice or complete regulatory coverage. This is a starter content pack for scoping purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice or a complete compliance determination.

sections.title: IT Governance and Board Oversight
sections.description: Board-level accountability for IT and cyber governance

sections.title: Controls and Assurance
sections.description: Independent assurance over IT and cyber controls

obligations.title: Board-approved IT and cyber governance framework
obligations.description: Maintain board-approved IT governance, risk management, control, and assurance practices with clear accountability.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies to all RBI-regulated entities in scope of the IT governance master direction.

obligations.title: Independent assurance over critical IT controls
obligations.description: Run periodic independent assurance over material IT and cyber controls and track remediation to closure.
obligations.applicability_notes: Assurance findings should be reported to the IT strategy/risk committee with remediation timelines.

content_versions.obligation_text: Maintain a board-approved IT governance framework with defined roles, risk committee oversight, and documented accountability.
Perform periodic independent assurance over critical IT and cyber controls with tracked remediation.

control_suggestions.control_description: Conduct periodic independent internal audit or assurance testing of material IT and cyber controls, with board-level reporting and tracked remediation.
